headline: Otis First Quarter 2026 Earnings Advisory
summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) will host a conference call on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Otis Chair, CEO & President Judy Marks and Executive Vice President & CFO Cristina Mendez will discuss the company's first quarter results and 2026 outlook.
